tour.description: Theme routes that prove the same canonical structure can wear different visual systems.

inlineData.name: Cyberblue
inlineData.description: Theme Builder copy of cyberpink with the hot pink pushed to electric blue.

inlineData.name: Cyberpink
inlineData.description: Neon-heavy synthwave treatment for loud demos and high-energy branded work.

inlineData.name: Theme Builder
inlineData.description: Copy an existing theme, replace colors, randomize, preview, and save a locked named theme.

inlineData.name: Editorial
inlineData.description: Typography-led paper-and-ink theme for authored, high-intent surfaces.

inlineData.name: Ghoul
inlineData.description: Acid green and blood red on near-black for dense consoles, TV-room dashboards, and log streams.

inlineData.name: Mockup
inlineData.description: Sketch-like wireframe treatment for concept reviews and low-fidelity product planning.

inlineData.name: Monochrome
inlineData.description: Neutral grayscale system with matching grayscale dark mode.

inlineData.name: Black and White
inlineData.description: Strict two-color theme: black on white, white on black in dark mode.

inlineData.name: Ocean
inlineData.description: Cool blue system for calmer dashboards and ambient product surfaces.

inlineData.name: Pastel Zombie
inlineData.description: Light mint, lilac, and candy-pink zombie treatment for playful horror-adjacent tools.

inlineData.name: Precog
inlineData.description: Signal-room palette for timeline, automation, and monitoring surfaces.

inlineData.name: Pumpkin
inlineData.description: Warm rounded theme for approachable and slightly playful product work.

inlineData.name: Sunset
inlineData.description: Warmer editorial palette for expressive showcase and storytelling surfaces.

inlineData.name: Terminal
inlineData.description: Sharp monochrome terminal style for command-heavy tools and operator consoles.

inlineData.name: Walmart
inlineData.description: Brand-specific blue and yellow treatment for explicit Walmart-flavored work only.

inlineData.name: Windows 3.1
inlineData.description: Sharp gray bevels, blue chrome, and Times-flavored retro desktop styling.

inlineData.name: Red
inlineData.description: Clean simple-theme surfaces with a red accent.

inlineData.description: Clean simple-theme surfaces with an orange accent.

inlineData.description: Clean simple-theme surfaces with a deep-amber accent.

inlineData.description: Clean simple-theme surfaces with a green accent.

inlineData.description: Clean simple-theme surfaces with a blue accent.

inlineData.description: Clean simple-theme surfaces with an indigo accent.

inlineData.name: Violet
inlineData.description: Clean simple-theme surfaces with a violet accent.

inlineData.name: Mac
inlineData.description: Apple/macOS control language — SF system font, system blue, pill tabs, traffic-light modal close.
